blocks.text: High-Performance Containerboard & Specialty Papers

Engineered for strength, print quality, and sustainability, our full range of containerboard and specialty papers includes white and brown liners, kraftliners, coated grades, and custom solutions. Every roll is produced with precision and made from 100% recycled or responsibly sourced fibers—helping you achieve both performance and environmental goals.
Cardboard Trays & Inserts — Durable, Custom-Fitted, and Reliable Packaging

XinYuan manufactures corrugated packaging in Vietnam — including custom cardboard trays and die-cut inserts engineered for protection, precision, and sustainability.Our solutions help global brands reduce waste while improving product presentation and logistics efficiency.
Key Features:

• Lightweight yet durable corrugated packaging structuresCustom-fit inserts, dividers, and cardboard trays for automated assemblyFSC®-certified paperboard and recyclable linersDie-cut, laminated, and printed options available
• Lightweight yet durable corrugated packaging structures
Lightweight yet durable corrugated packaging structures
• Custom-fit inserts, dividers, and cardboard trays for automated assembly
Custom-fit inserts, dividers, and cardboard trays for automated assembly
• FSC®-certified paperboard and recyclable liners
FSC®-certified paperboard and recyclable liners
• Die-cut, laminated, and printed options available
Die-cut, laminated, and printed options available

At XinYuan, we design and manufacture corrugated trays, box inserts, and cardboard dividers that provide structural strength and optimized space utilization for a wide range of industries.From e-commerce shipments to retail product displays, our solutions combine durability, cost efficiency, and precise construction.
Our factories in Vietnam and China produce both standard and custom-fit tray solutions, ensuring every product is well-protected throughout transport and display.
Supplying Every Grade Your Business Needs

XinYuan supplies a complete range of cardboard grades and insert configurations engineered for both high-volume logistics and custom retail packaging.Our materials include Kraft liners, white-top liners, and specialty coated boards, ensuring both durability and superior print results.
Each tray or insert is cut with automated precision equipment, guaranteeing dimensional accuracy and consistent fit — even at scale.
Our tray systems are designed for:
• Electronics and device packaging — anti-static and secure fit inserts
Electronics and device packaging — anti-static and secure fit inserts
• Food and beverage logistics — moisture-resistant and recyclable trays
Food and beverage logistics — moisture-resistant and recyclable trays
• Retail displays — customizable print finishes and die-cut windows
Retail displays — customizable print finishes and die-cut windows
• E-commerce — lightweight construction with strong load resistance
E-commerce — lightweight construction with strong load resistance

Our Vietnam factory operates advanced B, E, and BC-flute corrugation lines, ensuring dimensional precision and high compression strength.Every project follows strict ISO 9001 and ISTA testing standards for reliability in transit and on-shelf performance.

We combine environmental performance with manufacturing efficiency — producing with ISO 9001-certified standards, recycled fiberboard, and sustainable coatings that meet global packaging requirements.
